headline: Jim Cramer Credits Lip-Bu Tan For an Amazing Performance of Intel
summary: Intel Corporation (NASDAQ:INTC) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. Expressing hope that the company can “turn things around,” Cramer said: Apparently… That’s no longer good enough, and maybe you have to have like the super future.
